account_empty_benefit_ai: AI assistant tips and answers about your route
account_empty_benefit_chat: Mentions and discussions from the trip chat
account_empty_benefit_reminders: Reminders about check-ins, transfers and cancellation deadlines
account_empty_desc: Connect a messenger in your trip settings to get reminders and AI assistant tips, right in your chat
account_hint: Enable notifications for another trip in its “Trip settings”
connect_after_hint: After pressing Start in Telegram, return here, the panel will refresh automatically
connect_dialog_desc: Open the bot via the link below and press Start. The link is valid for 10 minutes.
connect_success_desc: Done. This account is now linked to the trip and will receive reminders.
not_connected_desc: Click below to open the bot in Telegram and press Start. The link is valid for 10 minutes.
notifications_hint: Turn off to temporarily mute reminders for this trip
panel_hint: Connect your Telegram to receive reminders about hotels, transfers, car rentals and activities for this trip
unlink_body: Are you sure? {handle} will stop receiving notifications for this trip: check-ins, transfers, cancellation deadlines and chat mentions.
waiting_hint: Press Start in Telegram, then come back, the panel updates automatically
